notes:
## Create app overhaul + a native "webview" capability

**Create (Apps → Create)**
- The left sidebar is now the **full Code sidebar** — projects with nested conversations, live per-conversation agent status, **parallel agents across conversations**, ＋-new-chat-in-project, sort / rename / remove.
- **Resizable chat column** (drag the handle; double-click to reset to default).
- The agent can finally **see its own work**: a new `preview_check` tool boots the app in the real sandbox and reports blank frames, console/uncaught errors, and blocked embeds. Verify is now **.aip-aware** (no more meaningless type-checks on plain HTML/JS apps).
- The agent is taught the real platform limits (sandboxed iframe, X-Frame-Options, CORS, JS≠firewall) and reality-checks impossible requests up front.

**New `webview` capability**
- Apps declare `"webview"` + a `"webviewAllowlist"` and open real web windows via `window.chatoss.webview.open({url})`. Navigation is **firewalled to the allowlist at the OS level (Rust-enforced)** — the honest way to build a kiosk / kid-safe browser. Sites that refuse iframe embedding load fine.

Docs updated for the new capability and the embedding limits.
